title: On-chain activity shows elevated volatility in Bitcoin markets
summary: Recent on-chain metrics indicate increased transaction volume and volatility, which may raise uncertainty around near-term price targets.

title: Derivative open interest suggests risk of sharp price moves
summary: Open interest and funding rate shifts can precede outsized moves, increasing the risk of rapid market repricing.

title: IMF outlook cites persistent inflation risks
summary: The latest outlook highlights continued inflation pressure and uncertainty over the timing of rate cuts.

title: CBO baseline projects slower growth under tight policy
summary: Budget projections incorporate a slower growth path if rates remain higher for longer, influencing policy expectations.

title: Election calendar confirms key dates and certification windows
summary: The official election calendar provides resolution guidance and reduces ambiguity around certification timelines.

title: NASA mission update confirms revised launch window
summary: Mission updates outline target windows and official criteria for launch success and mission milestones.

title: IMF notes elevated geopolitical risk premiums
summary: Geopolitical risk can widen outcome distributions and raise dispute risk for loosely specified markets.
